title: Stake - REKT
relevance_summary: Hot wallet compromise leading to large-scale theft across multiple chains

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds from known compromised hot wallet addresses

red_flags: Transfers from known compromised hot wallet addresses
summary: Stake's hot wallets were compromised, leading to the theft of over $41M worth of tokens across Ethereum, Polygon, and BSC. A guard could have blocked transactions originating from known compromised hot wallet addresses.
